title: X7’s Totem Cups Original
description: Turns your totem into a cup with a heart. Just for some extra style
body: 🥤 X7’s Totem Cups 🥤 ✨ Features: - Simple - Clean - Lightweight - Compatible 💀 Check out the other styles [](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/x7s-totem-cups-red) [](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/x7s-totem-cups-blue) [](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/x7s-totem-cups-green) [](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/x7s-totem-cups-dark-red) 🎮 How to Install: 1. Download the pack (.zip file). 2. Drop it into your `resourcepacks` folder. 3. Open Minecraft → Settings → Resource Packs → Activate it. 4. Enjoy your new totem!
